segments.speaker: SPEAKER
segments.en: Good morning and thank you for coming here today.
segments.zh: 早上好，感谢各位今天前来。我想向大家通报学校即将进行的一些变化，这些变化将会影响到你们的孩子。

segments.speaker: SPEAKER
segments.en: I'd like to bring you up to date with changes in the school that will affect your children.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER
segments.en: As you know, the school buildings date from various times: some from the 1970s, some from the last five years, and of course Dartfield House is over a century old.
segments.zh: 如你们所知，学校的建筑建于不同的年代：有的建于20世纪70年代，有的是过去五年新建的，当然，达特菲尔德庄园本身已有一个多世纪的历史。它最初是由一位商人内维尔·理查兹委托建造的，本打算用作他的家族宅邸，但他在建成之前就去世了。他的继承人选择把它卖给了当地议会，议会将其改建成了办公场所。后来曾有计划把它改建成旅游信息中心，但因资金不足而未能实现，取而代之的是，40年前这里作为学校开办时，它成了整个学校的核心建筑。

segments.speaker: SPEAKER
segments.en: It was commissioned by a businessman, Neville Richards, and intended as his family home, but he died before it was completed.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER
segments.en: His heir chose to sell it to the local council, who turned it into offices.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER
segments.en: A later plan to convert it into a tourist information centre didn't come about, through lack of money, and instead it formed the nucleus of this school when it opened 40 years ago.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER
segments.en: The school has grown as the local population has increased, and I can now give you some news about the lower school site, which is separated from the main site by a road.
segments.zh: 随着当地人口的增长，学校也逐步扩大。下面我要告诉大家关于下部校区的一些消息，那片校区与主校区之间隔着一条马路。目前双方场地的开发已获得规划许可。下部校区将迁到即将在主校区新建的建筑里。开发商将在现有的下部校区场地上建造住宅。新校舍的建设应在未来几个月内动工。

segments.speaker: SPEAKER
segments.en: Planning permission has been granted for development of both sites.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER
segments.en: The lower school will move to new buildings that will be constructed on the main site.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER
segments.en: Developers will construct houses on the existing lower school site.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER
segments.en: Work on the new school buildings should start within the next few months.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER
segments.en: A more imminent change concerns the catering facilities and the canteen.
segments.zh: 一个更为迫近的变化涉及餐饮设施和食堂。整个午餐时段，食堂总是非常繁忙——事实上常常挤到爆满，因为我们很多学生都喜欢那里供应的食物。但由于只有一个供餐点，大多数学生不得不排相当长的时间才能拿到餐。这显然不理想，因为他们可能还没怎么吃完午餐，下午的课就要开始了。

words.def: 即将发生的；迫在眉睫的

segments.speaker: SPEAKER
segments.en: The canteen is always very busy throughout the lunch period – in fact it's often full to capacity, because a lot of our pupils like the food that's on offer there.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER
segments.en: But there's only one serving point, so most pupils have to wait a considerable time to be served.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER
segments.en: This is obviously unsatisfactory, as they may have hardly finished their lunch before afternoon lessons start.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER
segments.en: So we've had a new Food Hall built, and this will come into use next week.
segments.zh: 所以我们新建了一个美食大厅，下周就将投入使用。里面将设有多个供餐区，稍后我会详细介绍。但为了让美食大厅运转顺畅，我们请各位家长做一件事：每天早上和孩子讨论一下他们当天想吃哪一类食物，这样他们就可以直接前往对应的供餐点。这里不会有任何垃圾食品——所提供的一切都是健康的——用餐付款方式没有变化，家长依然通过在线充值孩子的电子付款卡即可。

segments.speaker: SPEAKER
segments.en: It'll have several serving areas, and I'll give you more details about those in a minute, but one thing we ask you to do, to help in the smooth running of the Food Hall, is to discuss with your children each morning which type of food they want to eat that day, so they can go straight to the relevant serving point.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER
segments.en: There won't be any junk food – everything on offer will be healthy – and there's no change to the current system of paying for lunches by topping up your child's electronic payment card online.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER
segments.en: You may be wondering what will happen to the old canteen.
segments.zh: 你们可能会想，旧食堂将会怎么处理。我们仍会在那里保留桌椅，学生可以把在美食大厅买来的餐或从家里带来的午餐拿到那儿吃。以后我们或许会把食堂的一部分改作储藏用途，但要先看看午餐时段究竟有多少学生会去那儿。

segments.speaker: SPEAKER
segments.en: We'll still have tables and chairs in there, and pupils can eat food from the Food Hall or lunch they've brought from home.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER
segments.en: Eventually we may use part of the canteen for storage, but first we'll see how many pupils go in there at lunchtime.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER
segments.en: OK, back to the serving points in the Food Hall, which will all have side dishes, desserts and drinks on sale, as well as main courses.
segments.zh: 好，回到美食大厅的各个供餐点。除了主菜之外，它们都会售卖配菜、甜点和饮料。

segments.speaker: SPEAKER
segments.en: One serving point we call World Adventures.
segments.zh: 第一个供餐点叫做"环球探险"。这里每天都会供应一个不同国家的菜肴，比如一天中式，第二天黎巴嫩菜。菜单会按一周为单位提前制定，所以学生可以知道整周内会有哪些餐食供应。

segments.speaker: SPEAKER
segments.en: This will serve a different country's cuisine each day, maybe Chinese one day and Lebanese the next.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER
segments.en: The menus will be planned for a week at a time, so pupils will know what's going to be available the whole of that week.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER
segments.en: Street Life is also international, with food from three particular cultures.
segments.zh: "街头生活"也是国际风味，供应来自三种特定文化的美食。我们会请学生给出建议，所以有时可能是泰国、埃塞俄比亚和墨西哥菜，随后其中一种可能被牙买加菜替换一两周。

segments.speaker: SPEAKER
segments.en: We'll ask pupils to make suggestions, so perhaps sometimes there'll be food from Thailand, Ethiopia and Mexico, and then one of them will be replaced by Jamaican food for a week or two.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER
segments.en: The Speedy Italian serving point will cater particularly for the many pupils who don't eat meat or fish: they can be sure that all the food served there is suitable for them.
segments.zh: "意式快餐"供餐点将特别照顾许多不吃肉或不吃鱼的学生：他们可以放心，这里供应的所有食物都适合他们食用。品种也很多，所以他们不会吃腻。

segments.speaker: SPEAKER
segments.en: There'll be plenty of variety, so they shouldn't get bored with the food.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER
segments.en: OK, that's all on the new Food Hall.
segments.zh: 好，关于新美食大厅就介绍到这里。下面谈谈课后活动。这些课程在学生中非常受欢迎，尤其是游泳——事实上想学游泳的人已经排起了候补名单。骑自行车也是一大热门，令我欣慰的是，有几十名学生利用这个机会学习越野骑行。这也意味着越来越多的学生每天骑车上下学。

segments.speaker: SPEAKER
segments.en: Now after-school lessons.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER
segments.en: These are very popular with pupils, particularly swimming – in fact there's a waiting list for lessons.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER
segments.en: Cycling is another favourite, and I'm delighted that dozens of pupils make use of the chance to learn to ride in off-road conditions.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER
segments.en: It means that more and more cycle to and from school every day.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER
segments.en: As you know, we have a well-equipped performance centre, and we're going to start drama classes in there, too.
segments.zh: 大家知道，我们有一个设备齐全的演艺中心，我们也将在那里开设戏剧课。学生们可以纯粹为了兴趣加入，也可以一步步参与到戏剧演出中——我们希望每年至少能上演一部戏。我们已经在教一些学生使用中心的音响和灯光设备。此外，一位老校友向学校捐赠了一架宏伟的三角钢琴，因此有一部分学生可以在校内学习钢琴，而不必像现在许多人那样跑去当地的学院上课。

segments.speaker: SPEAKER
segments.en: Pupils will be able to join in just for fun or work up to taking part in a play – we hope to put on at least one a year.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER
segments.en: We already teach a number of pupils to use the sound and lighting systems in the centre.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER
segments.en: And a former pupil has given a magnificent grand piano to the school, so a few pupils will be able to learn at the school instead of going to the local college, as many of them do at the moment.

questions.title: Questions 11–15
instructions: Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.

items.prompt:
Dartfield House school used to be
A a tourist information centre.
B a private home.
C a local council building.

pairs.q: Dartfield House school used to be
pairs.p: sell it to the local council, who turned it into offices
pairs.note: 题干问过去用途，原文说继承人把它卖给地方议会，议会把它改造成办公楼，即 local council building。

pairs.p: local council
pairs.note: 关键词 local council 原文直接出现，供给议会做办公即议会大楼。

paraphrase.explain: 关键句 His heir chose to sell it to the local council, who turned it into offices，说明它曾是 local council 的办公楼，选 C。A 只是后来一个未实现的计划；B 是最初的意图，从未实现（在他建成前就去世了）。

items.prompt:
What is planned with regard to the lower school?
A All buildings on the main site will be improved.
B The lower school site will be used for new homes.
C Additional school buildings will be constructed on the lower school site.

pairs.p: existing lower school site
pairs.note: 题干 lower school site 与原文同词。

pairs.p: construct houses on the existing lower school site
pairs.note: new homes = houses；used for 对应 construct on。

paraphrase.explain: 关键句 Developers will construct houses on the existing lower school site，原下部校区场地将建住宅，选 B。C 说错方向——下部校区搬到主校区，而不是在下部校区再建校舍。

items.prompt:
The catering has been changed because of
A long queuing times.
B changes to the school timetable.
C dissatisfaction with the menus.

pairs.p: wait a considerable time to be served
pairs.note: long queuing times = wait a considerable time to be served，都指等候时间过长。

pairs.p: only one serving point
pairs.note: 只有一个打饭窗口导致排队久，是餐饮变革的原因。

paraphrase.explain: 关键句 there's only one serving point, so most pupils have to wait a considerable time to be served，说明改动是因为学生等候时间长，即 long queuing times，选 A。

items.prompt:
Parents are asked to
A help their children to decide in advance which serving point to use.
B make sure their children have enough money for food.
C advise their children on healthy food to eat.

pairs.q: help their children to decide in advance
pairs.p: discuss with your children each morning
pairs.note: in advance = each morning（每天早上事先），即提前和孩子商量。

pairs.p: which type of food they want to eat that day, so they can go straight to the relevant serving point
pairs.note: 决定要吃哪种食物，就是决定要去哪个供餐点。

paraphrase.explain: 关键句 discuss with your children each morning which type of food they want to eat that day, so they can go straight to the relevant serving point，即家长要帮孩子事先决定去哪个供餐点，选 A。

items.prompt:
What does the speaker say about the existing canteen?
A Food will still be served there.
B Only staff will have access to it.
C Pupils can take their food into it.

pairs.p: the old canteen
pairs.note: existing = old（现存的旧食堂）。

pairs.q: Pupils can take their food into it
pairs.p: pupils can eat food from the Food Hall or lunch they've brought from home
pairs.note: 允许学生把美食大厅或从家带来的食物拿到旧食堂吃，即 take food into it。

paraphrase.explain: 关键句 We'll still have tables and chairs in there, and pupils can eat food from the Food Hall or lunch they've brought from home，说明学生可以把食物拿进旧食堂吃，选 C。A 错——旧食堂不再供餐；B 未提及。

questions.title: Questions 16–18
instructions: What comment does the speaker make about each of the following serving points in the Food Hall?
Choose THREE answers from the box and write the correct letter, A–D, next to Questions 16–18.
A pupils help to plan menus

pairs.p: World Adventures
pairs.note: 标题名称原文直出。

pairs.p: a different country's cuisine each day
pairs.note: daily change = each day 每天更换菜单。

paraphrase.explain: 关键句 This will serve a different country's cuisine each day，每天供应不同国家菜肴，对应 D daily change in menu。

pairs.p: Street Life
pairs.note: 供餐点名称原文直出。

pairs.p: We'll ask pupils to make suggestions
pairs.note: ask pupils to make suggestions = pupils help to plan menus，让学生参与菜单策划。

paraphrase.explain: 关键句 We'll ask pupils to make suggestions，说明学生帮忙出主意规划菜单，对应 A pupils help to plan menus。

pairs.p: Speedy Italian
pairs.note: 供餐点名称原文直出。

pairs.p: cater particularly for the many pupils who don't eat meat or fish
pairs.note: 不吃肉或鱼即素食者，only vegetarian food 对应此类饮食。

paraphrase.explain: 关键句 will cater particularly for the many pupils who don't eat meat or fish，专门服务不吃肉/鱼的学生，即素食，对应 B only vegetarian food。

questions.title: Questions 19 and 20
instructions: Which TWO optional after-school lessons are new?

items.prompt: Which TWO optional after-school lessons are new?

pairs.p: a former pupil has given a magnificent grand piano to the school, so a few pupils will be able to learn at the school
pairs.note: 以前学生要去当地学院学钢琴，现因捐赠钢琴才可以在校学习，说明钢琴课是新增的。

pairs.p: grand piano
pairs.note: 题干 piano 与原文 grand piano 同词。

paraphrase.explain: 关键句 a former pupil has given a magnificent grand piano to the school, so a few pupils will be able to learn at the school instead of going to the local college，说明钢琴课是新开设的（此前需去当地学院学），选 B。

items.prompt: Which TWO optional after-school lessons are new?

pairs.p: we're going to start drama classes
pairs.note: going to start = 新开设，即 new。

pairs.p: drama classes
pairs.note: acting 对应 drama（戏剧），戏剧课就是演戏/表演课。

paraphrase.explain: 关键句 we're going to start drama classes in there, too，即将开设新的戏剧（表演）课，对应 C acting。
